# StealthEye Cloud Full Agent Context

## Identity

StealthEye Cloud is the no-local, ChatGPT-native GitHub/browser execution-body agent. ChatGPT remains the primary intelligence. GitHub Actions, browser proof, Codex worker packets, Skills, Tasks, Relay, Seal, and memory artifacts provide execution and continuity.

## Operating mode

Use one active ChatGPT tab until saturation. At saturation, update Relay, Seal, Active, and Next Action. The next tab resumes from those artifacts.

## Canonical files

- `AGENTS.md` instructs agents.
- `llms.txt` orients agents compactly.
- `llms-full.txt` gives expanded agent context.
- `AGENT_REPO_MAP.md` maps the repo.
- `STEALTHEYE_ACTIVE.md` gives current mission state.
- `STEALTHEYE_DECISIONS.md` prevents drift.
- `STEALTHEYE_RELAY.md/json` transfers executable context.
- `STEALTHEYE_SEAL.json` checkpoints truth.
- `NEXT_ACTION.md` gives one exact next action.

## Completed build sequence

1. S0 — Foundation, Continuity, Packet Spine, and Cheap CI
2. S1 — Mission Executor, Atomic Drop Rail, Authority Queue, and GitHub Evidence
3. S2 — Browser Body, Replay Proof, and Visual Evidence
4. S3 — MCP/App Control Plane, Tool Registry, Skills, Workers, and Background Capability Reality
5. S4 — Self-Improving Skills, Past-Session Search, Hypothesis Racing, and Public Proof Canvas
6. S5 — Full Hardening, Public Release Candidate, and First End-to-End Mission
7. S6 — Zero-Trust Cross-Cloud Gateway
8. S7 — First Real Activations
9. S8 — StealthEye Cloud Remediator
10. S9 — One-Drop Build Accelerator

## Selected next mission

```text
S10 — Assistant Optimization Layer
```

S10 is selected for setup. No S10 implementation has started.

S10 optimizes the assistant/operator layer so ChatGPT uses the S9 one-drop rail with better mission intake, context loading, repo-truth handling, tool planning, fallback recovery, proof reasoning, low-attention operation, handoff quality, read-only verification, and self-audit.

## S10 setup branch

```text
build/s10-assistant-optimization-layer-setup
```

## S10 implementation branch after setup merges

```text
build/s10-assistant-optimization-layer
```

## S10 implementation prompt

```text
docs/PROMPTS/S10_IMPLEMENTATION_PROMPT.md
```

## S10 implementation scan pack

Before implementing S10, read:

```text
AGENTS.md
STEALTHEYE_DECISIONS.md
STEALTHEYE_ACTIVE.md
STEALTHEYE_RELAY.md
STEALTHEYE_RELAY.json
STEALTHEYE_SEAL.json
NEXT_ACTION.md
README.md
AGENT_REPO_MAP.md
llms.txt
llms-full.txt
docs/StealthEye_Cloud_Build_Plan.md
docs/HANDOFF_AND_CONTINUATION.md
docs/S9_ONE_DROP_BUILD_ACCELERATOR.md
docs/ONE_DROP_BUILD_MODE.md
docs/MISSION_APPROVAL_ENVELOPE.md
docs/BATCH_REPAIR_POLICY.md
docs/MERGE_AWARE_HANDOFF.md
docs/PHASE_TEMPLATE_SYSTEM.md
docs/S10_ASSISTANT_OPTIMIZATION_LAYER.md
docs/ASSISTANT_OPERATING_PROFILE.md
docs/MISSION_INTAKE_OPTIMIZER.md
docs/CONTEXT_LOAD_POLICY.md
docs/REPO_TRUTH_FIRST_POLICY.md
docs/LOW_ATTENTION_WORKDAY_MODE.md
docs/HANDOFF_QUALITY_GATE.md
docs/TOOL_USE_PLANNER.md
docs/TOOL_FALLBACK_POLICY.md
docs/PROMPT_COMPRESSION.md
docs/SCOPE_DRIFT_GUARD.md
docs/PROOF_AWARENESS_LAYER.md
docs/REPAIR_INTELLIGENCE_LAYER.md
docs/READ_ONLY_VERIFICATION_MODE.md
docs/ASSISTANT_SELF_AUDIT.md
docs/CAPABILITY_REALITY_MAP.md
docs/BUILD_COCKPIT_CARD.md
docs/AGENT_OBSERVABILITY_TRACE_DIGEST.md
docs/MCP_AWARE_OPERATOR_POLICY.md
```

## S10 implementation shape

S10 implementation must add:

```text
crates/secloud-assistant-optimizer
.github/workflows/proof-assistant-optimizer.yml
scripts/s10-assistant-optimizer-proof.mjs
scripts/check-s10-assistant-optimizer-artifacts.mjs
.stealtheye/assistant-optimizer/
```

## Non-negotiables

- No hidden autonomy claims.
- No Claude/Copilot/Cursor/soul files.
- No local requirement by default.
- No private leakage in public repo.
- No watered-down core builds.
- No per-file confirmation model.
- No validator, schema, workflow, proof, safety, or merge-discipline weakening.
- No browser-cookie/session-token automation.
